headline: Snowflake CEO: AI Agents Enabling Round-the-Clock Engineering Output
summary: Snowflake's CEO reports developers are sustaining 24-hour productivity cycles through AI agents, signaling measurable ROI on AI tooling at scale. This positions Snowflake as a credible AI-native data platform story—not just a storage play—heading into competitive cloud data wars. The implication: AI-augmented engineering velocity is becoming a differentiator customers will pay for and a proof point rivals must match.
oci_implication: As Snowflake narrows the perception gap between itself and hyperscaler-native data platforms, OCI must sharpen its Autonomous Database and Select AI positioning to counter the narrative that third-party AI tooling on cloud data beats first-party integration. Karan's product team should assess whether OCI's developer AI story—particularly around coding agents and platform productivity—is as tangible and customer-visible as what Snowflake is now publicly claiming.
